name: Platform Deployer Agent
description: Multi-cloud container deployment agent. Autonomously builds, pushes, deploys, validates, and rolls back container services across AWS (EKS/ECR), GCP (GKE/Artifact Registry), and Azure (AKS/ACR).

skills.name: AWS Deployment
skills.description: Build, push, and deploy container services to AWS EKS using ECR and CodeBuild. Validates deployment health and supports automatic rollback.
examples: Deploy orders-api v1.4.2 to EKS with 3 replicas
Build and deploy my-service to the AWS cluster in ap-northeast-2

skills.name: GCP Deployment
skills.description: Build, push, and deploy container services to GKE using Artifact Registry and Cloud Build. Validates deployment health and supports automatic rollback.
examples: Deploy payment-service v2.0.0 to GKE with 2 replicas
Build and push analytics-worker to Artifact Registry, then deploy to GKE

skills.name: Azure Deployment
skills.description: Build, push, and deploy container services to AKS using ACR Tasks. Validates deployment health and supports automatic rollback.
examples: Deploy user-service v3.1.0 to AKS in koreacentral
Build with ACR Tasks and deploy to our Azure cluster

skills.name: Local Deployment
skills.description: Build, push, and deploy container services to a local kind cluster with localhost registry. Ideal for development and testing.
examples: Deploy my-service v0.1.0 to the local kind cluster
Test deploy frontend-app locally with 1 replica

skills.name: Deployment Validation
skills.description: Validate the health and readiness of a deployed service by checking rollout status across any supported provider.
examples: Validate that orders-api is healthy on GKE
Check if the latest deployment of user-service is ready on AKS

skills.name: Deployment Rollback
skills.description: Rollback a failed deployment to its previous stable version on any supported provider.
examples: Rollback orders-api on EKS to the previous version
The deploy failed — rollback payment-service on GKE
